since_last: 54% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.86%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +0.95% · Gold -0.02% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 54% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.86%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.86%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +6.71%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +6.71%, MDB +5.60%, BABA +4.71%, SMR +3.50%, MRVL +3.31%. Laggards: ORCL -3.70%, ADBE -3.68%, DELL -3.24%, SPCX -3.06%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.06% at $120.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.06% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
